Our Service

Equipping Every Generation

Discover how we serve our community through dedicated ministries focused on spiritual growth, biblical foundation, and genuine Christian fellowship.

Youth Ministry

Our vision is to see the youth of our congregation as God-fearing and serving individuals who are fruitful in ministry and in their witness in everyday life. We focus on shaping identities in Christ through the Word and genuine Christian love.

Explore Youth Ministry

Children's Ministry

Based on Proverbs 22:6, we help children develop a personal relationship with Lord Jesus Christ. We provide a safe, holistic environment where the next generation grows in wisdom, stature, and favor with God.

Explore Children's Ministry

Building a bridge between generations, anchored in the eternal Word of God.
